sentences.arabic: يَصِلُ الْمُهَنْدِسُ إِلَى الْمَكْتَبِ فِي السَّاعَةِ الثَّامِنَةِ صَبَاحًا.
sentences.translation: Inženjer dolazi u kancelariju u osam sati ujutro.
sentences.translationEn: The engineer arrives at the office at eight o'clock in the morning.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ رَسَائِلَ الْبَرِيدِ الْإِلِكْتْرُونِيِّ وَيُحَضِّرُ جَدْوَلَ أَعْمَالِهِ.
sentences.translation: Čita e-mailove i priprema svoj raspored rada.
sentences.translationEn: He reads emails and prepares his work schedule.

sentences.arabic: يَأْخُذُ اسْتِرَاحَةً قَصِيرَةً لِتَنَاوُلِ الْقَهْوَةِ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِ.
sentences.translation: Pravi kratku pauzu da popije kafu sa svojim prijateljima.
sentences.translationEn: He takes a short break to have coffee with his friends.
